mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, client_code, client_name, key_id, key_prefix, key_hash, credential_version, service_user_id, active_org_id, oauth_enabled, oauth_client_type, status, expires_at, last_used_at, remark, del_flag, create_by, create_time, create_dept, update_by, update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM ai_capability_client WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND del_flag = 0
AND (client_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR client_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND status = #{status} ORDER BY update_time DESC, id DESC
SELECT FROM ai_capability_client WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id} AND del_flag = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM ai_capability_client WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND client_code = #{clientCode} AND del_flag = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM ai_capability_client WHERE key_id = #{keyId} AND del_flag = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM ai_capability_client WHERE id = #{id} AND del_flag = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_capability_client SET key_id = #{keyId}, key_prefix = #{keyPrefix}, key_hash = #{keyHash}, credential_version = credential_version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id} AND del_flag = 0 AND status = 'ENABLED' AND credential_version = #{credentialVersion}

UPDATE ai_capability_client SET status = 'REVOKED', credential_version = credential_version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id} AND del_flag = 0 AND status = 'ENABLED' AND credential_version = #{credentialVersion}

UPDATE ai_capability_client SET oauth_enabled = #{oauthEnabled}, oauth_client_type = #{oauthClientType}, credential_version = credential_version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id} AND del_flag = 0 AND status = 'ENABLED' AND credential_version = #{credentialVersion}
